working_on.task: Completed Settings UI and bug fixing

pending_tasks.task: Phase 04: Full Verification & Automated Regression Tests
Future: Migrate off Chaquopy to drop 2.5s overhead

recent_changes.description: Implemented dynamic Gemini model management with user-defined priority, fallback rotation, and connectivity testing UI.
Moved youtube-transcript-api update banner from Settings to MainScreen for better visibility. Integrated check into SummaryViewModel init.

errors_encountered.error: Kotlin String Templates escaped as literals during write_to_file
errors_encountered.solution: Manually fixed escapes in SettingsScreen.kt to ensure variable interpolation works.

decisions_made.decision: Use JSON-serialized SharedPreferences for Model List
decisions_made.reason: Simplest way to persist ordered lists without complex schema overhead.
Ensure users can always return to a 'stable' state if they mess up model names.
